detail: blocked read of a secret file (.env)

{"severity":"high","line":23,"category":"misunderstood-scope","evidence":"compute_discount appends every call to the module-global _AUDIT list — the spec required a pure function","suggested_fix":"drop _AUDIT; keep compute_discount side-effect free"}

{"severity":"medium","line":6,"category":"weak-tests","evidence":"test asserts only `result is not None`, so it passes for any wrong value and never checks 10% off 100 == 90","suggested_fix":"assert the exact discounted total and add the no-op / unknown-coupon case"}
